title: pinalia bicristata
intro: Pinalia bicristata is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as Indonesia and Malaysia. It is also known as the Two-horned Pinalia or Two-horned Orchid, characterized by its unique pair of horn-like structures on its stem. Pinalia bicristata has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
